tools.name: get_customer_context
tools.description: Fetch one customer with their recent orders and an order-count / spend summary in a single call. Prefer this over separate customer + order-list tools (consolidation over proliferation).

customerId.description: Primary-key value of the customer to load.

tools.name: get_order_detail
tools.description: Fetch one order with its customer and its line items in a single call, so an agent does not fan out three separate lookups to understand one order.

orderId.description: Primary-key value of the order to load.

tools.name: get_product_overview
tools.description: Fetch one product with the category it belongs to, so catalog questions resolve in one call rather than a product read followed by a category read.

productId.description: Primary-key value of the product to load.

tools.name: get_category_catalog
tools.description: Fetch one category with its products and a product-count summary, consolidating the common 'what is in this category' question into a single tool call.

categoryId.description: Primary-key value of the category to load.
